value.found_quote: There is currently no support for: Bring-your-own-key or bring-your-own-endpoint for additional rate limits; Organizational tiers via contract
value.rationale: The page does not mention any feature for tracking or capping token spend or usage costs. While it describes quota/rate limits and AI credit overages, there is no mention of a dedicated "Cost & usage tracking" feature that allows users to track or cap token spend. The page explicitly lists unsupported features, and cost/spend tracking is not described anywhere as an available offering.
